analysis_commentary: Training throughput collapse: only 120 steps (vs 538 baseline, -78%). 0 arenas. max_prob=0.06 looks excellent but is misleading — the network barely trained. legal_mass=0.015 confirms near-random init. Per-step probes look fine because gradient updates were minimal. This is a system-level regression even though point-metrics technically pass goal thresholds. Tiny entropy bump shouldnt have caused this — controller dynamics likely shifted unfortunately. Reject.
